5751C8C84465C834F6FC858F2650703B: A device allows Creators to manage the player character movement configurations on different move modes.
578CE9D94019DFD780D00FB164476025: A device allows Creators to manage the player character movement configurations on different move modes.
86BC738448ECB8DA05D1678D9B91044C: A device allows Creators to manage the player character movement configurations on different move modes.
57C3086640B6CC78D32F64908E136057: Enable a preview of the movement settings in Live Edit.

Adds the movement settings to all the Players, activating if the highest priority.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_PlayerMovement_C.AddToPlayer.Desc: Adds the movement settings to the instigating Player, activating if the highest priority.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_PlayerMovement_C.bAddToPlayersOnS: At game start determines if the movement settings are applied to valid player characters or not.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_DBNO_C.DBNOMa: DBNO crawl speed for the character.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Common_C.Relo:
Default multiplier to apply to the player's speed if they are reloading.
This multiplier can be applied differently to each individual movement mode.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Common_C.Shoo:
Default multiplier to apply to the player's speed if they are shooting.
This multiplier can be applied differently to each individual movement mode.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_WallKicking_C: Determine the maximum number of wall kicks a player can perform before becoming fatigued.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Gliding_C.Gli: Determines how floaty or snappy is changing lateral direction in Gliding mode.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Skydiving_C.S: Determines how floaty or snappy is changing lateral direction in Skydiving mode.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Energy_C.Ener: Determines how long of a delay there is after players have stopped using Energy before it recharges.
Determines how much Energy is available. This affects Sprint and other abilities that use Energy.
Determines how much Energy is drained per second while Sprinting.
Determines how much Energy is drained while Jumping.
Determines how much Energy is recharged per second after Energy Recharge Delay occurs.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Sliding_C.bAl: Determines if Shoulder Bash is available or not. Shoulder Bash automatically opens doors while sliding or sprinting through them.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_RollLanding_C: Determines if players can activate a roll landing when falling to the ground. A successful roll landing can maintain momentum, restore energy, and reduce fall damage.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_BoostedJumpin: Determines if the associated player can perform a higher and faster jump when they are sprinting near an edge.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Hurdling_C.bA: Determines if the associated player character can hurdle over an object or not.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Sliding_C.bAl: Determines if the associated player character can slide or not.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Sprinting_C.b: Determines if the associated player character can sprint or not.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Hurdling_C.bA: Determines if the player character is automatically performing hurdling or not.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_RollLanding_C: Determines the amount of energy that is recovered when the player executes a successful Roll Landing.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Jumping_C.Air:
Determines the amount of lateral movement control available to the character when falling.
0 = no control, 1 = full control at max walk speed.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_BoostedJumpin: Determines the energy cost required to launch Boost Jumping.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_RollLanding_C: Determines the flat amount of fall damage that is mitigated by a successful Roll Landing.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_BoostedJumpin: Determines the horizontal jump velocity while in the Boost Jumping mode.
Determines the maximum Jump vertical velocity while in the Boost Jumping mode.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Mantling_C.Ma: Determines the minimum height from the ground that a ledge must be in order to be a valid mantling location.
Determines the minimum height from the ground that a ledge must be in order to be a valid mantling location.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_RollLanding_C: Determines the multiplier applied to Roll Landing Energy Recovery on consecutive Roll Landings within a short period of each other.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_WallKicking_C: Determines the strength of the horizontal force of a wall kick.
Determines the strength of the vertical force of a wall kick.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_RollLanding_C: Determines the the input skill setting to execute a RollLanding. LOW allows player to hold the input while falling. HIGH requires players to perform the input within the Roll Landing Skill Window of time before hitting the ground.
Determines the window of time (in seconds) that a player has, before hitting the ground, to trigger a roll landing and have it be successful.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Jumping_C.bJu: Determines whether continuous jumping applies a penalty to jump height.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Falling_C.bFa: Determines whether fall damage is capped regardless of fall height.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Flying_C.bAll: Determines whether players are able to fly during the game.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Gliding_C.bGl: Determines whether players can freely deploy their gliders without the use of items.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Hurdling_C.bA: Determines whether players can hurdle over low obstacles if they can be jumped over.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_WallKicking_C: Determines whether players can kick off of walls.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Flying_C.bAll: Determines whether players can use the Sprint key while flying to increase movement speed.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Sliding_C.bAl: Determines whether sliding players can use the slide kick to impact and knock away players on an opposing team.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_WallKicking_C: Determines whether the player can wall kick an infinite number of times.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_PlayerMovement_C.SelectedClass.De: Determines which Classes can be affected by the device.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_PlayerMovement_C.SelectedTeam.Des: Determines which Teams can be affected by the device.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_PlayerMovement_C.Priority.Descrip: Determines which device is active, multiple devices can be present at any time, but only the one with the highest priority is considered active.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_PlayerMovement_C.EnabledDuringPha: Determines which phase the device is enabled.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_PlayerMovement_C.MovementSettingP: Determines which preset the device is applying the movement settings to the player characters.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Common_C.Brak:
Factor used to multiply actual value of friction used when braking
This factor will be used to multiply the values specified for each game mode.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Falling_C.bFa: Fall damage will cause the character to stagger.
Fall damage will drain stamina from the character.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_PlayerMovement_C.CategoryFilter.D: Filters the option list down to just the selected category of movement options.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_PlayerMovement_C.bInvertClassSele: If FALSE, only the selected Class is affected by the device. If TRUE, all Classes except the selected Class are affected by the device.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_PlayerMovement_C.bInvertTeamSelec: If FALSE, only the selected Team is affected by the device. If TRUE, all Teams except the selected Team are affected by the device.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Jumping_C.Jum: Initial velocity (instantaneous vertical acceleration) when jumping.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Mantling_C.Ma: Mantling Minimal Ledge Height in Water
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Swimming_C.Sw: Max Acceleration for the Swimming mode, which is rate of change of velocity.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Skydiving_C.S: Max horizontal acceleration. Diminished when diving down in Skydiving mode.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Gliding_C.Gli: Max lateral speed in the horizontal direction. Diminished when diving down in Gliding mode.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Skydiving_C.S: Max lateral speed in the horizontal direction. Diminished when diving down in Skydiving mode.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Gliding_C.Gli: Max vertical velocity when falling down. Ignored if set to 0.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Skydiving_C.S: Max vertical velocity when falling down. Ignored if set to 0.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Common_C.Maxi:
Maximum Acceleration, which is rate of change of velocity
This acceleration will be applied to any movement mode unless being overridden by the mode specifically.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Sprinting_C.T: Maximum multiplier to the default Jump Velocity when the tactical sprint reaches its highest speed.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Jumping_C.Jum: Maximum time the player is allowed to hold the jump button so the character can jump in the air.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Sprinting_C.T: Minimal speed multiplier to the maximum sprint speed when the tactical sprint reaches its highest speed.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_PlayerMovement_C.RemoveFromAllPla: Removes the movement settings from all the Players.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_PlayerMovement_C.RemoveFromPlayer: Removes the movement settings from the instigating Player.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Falling_C.Fal: Scales the fall damage the character takes.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Flying_C.Flig: Sets a multiplier on movement speed when flying.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Walking_C.Gro: Setting that affects movement control. Higher values allow faster changes in direction.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Energy_C.Paus: Should energy consumption be paused during falling.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Sliding_C.Sli: The maximum dash duration for Sliding.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Sprinting_C.S: The maximum ground speed when sprinting..
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Crouching_C.C: The maximum ground speed when walking and crouched.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Walking_C.Wal: The maximum ground speed when walking.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Swimming_C.Sw: The maximum normal speed when Swimming.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Sliding_C.Sli: The maximum speed in the forward movement direction that can be reached while Sliding.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Swimming_C.Sw: The maximum sprinting speed when Swimming.
UserOptionDefinition.PlayerMovementSettingsComp_Falling_C.bGr: Will allow the player to close the glider and rush towards the ground.
